title: Ancient Gems: Reforged
description: Add 75 gems and numerous minerals that will allow craft a multitude of tools, armors, decorative elements, and building blocks that will complement your gaming experience.
body:
**
Ancient Gems Reforged expands the Minecraft universe by introducing various unique gems and minerals, scattered across all three dimensions, significantly enriching the mining experience. The mod doesn't just offer a new arsenal of tools, weapons, and armor; it redefines progression through advanced mechanics: increased harvest levels, a nerf to high-tier materials (diamond and netherite), and a durability system conditioned by the dimension you are in and the difficulty level you are playing on. With the threat of new enemies hidden within ores and chests, exploration becomes a much more challenging experience.
**

**➤ Nerfed diamond and netherite to encourage mining (decreased durability)**
➜ Tools and weapons crafted with diamond (vanilla) or netherite in all dimensions
_↪ 97.5% less durability in hard (durability/40) - 95% less durability in normal (durability/20) - 90% less durability in easy or peaceful (durability/10)_
➜ Armors crafted with diamond (vanilla) or netherite in all dimensions
_↪ 95% less durability in hard (durability/20) - 90% less durability in normal (durability/10) - 80% less durability in easy or peaceful (durability/5)_
**➤ Replaced vanilla ores (netherite, diamond, emerald, gold, nether gold, iron and coal)**
**➤ Ore generation modified**
➜ Replaced iron ore with hematite ore and decreased generation
➜ Decreased gold ore generation
➜ Increased diamond ore generation
➜ Increased ancient debris generation
➜ Replaced nether gold ore
**➤ Compatible with ores in 'ore dictionary' (only metals)**
**➤ Harvest level increased to 9 (vanilla 4)**
**➤ Added 75 gems**
➜ 25 Overworld gems
➜ 25 Nether gems
➜ 25 End gems
**➤ Added 26 minerals**
➜ 18 metals (5 alloys)
➜ 3 fuels
➜ 5 others
**➤ Added 86 armor set and swords**
**➤ Added 85 tools set**
**➤ Added new weapons (battle axe, bone breaker, crosier and heavy sword)**
**➤ Added new tools (hammer and sharp hammer)**
**➤ The durability (tools, weapons, and armors) will change depending on the dimension and difficulty**
➜ Tools and weapons crafted from Overworld materials (while you remain in the dimension)
_↪ In the Nether dimension: 87.5% less durability in hard (durability/8) - 75% less durability in normal (durability/4) - 50% less durability in easy or peaceful (durability/2)_
_↪ In the End dimension: 93.75% less durability in hard (durability/16) - 87.5% less durability in normal (durability/8) - 75% less durability in easy or peaceful (durability/4)_
➜ Armors crafted from Overworld materials (while you remain in the dimension)
_↪ In the Nether dimension: 75% less durability in hard (durability/4) - 50% less durability in normal (durability/2) - 100% durability in easy or peaceful (no change)_
_↪ In the End dimension: 87.5% less durability in hard (durability/8) - 75% less durability in normal (durability/4) - 50% less durability in easy or peaceful (durability/2)_
➜ Tools and weapons crafted from Nether materials (while you remain in the dimension)
_↪ In the End dimension: 90% less durability in normal or hard (durability/10) <-> 80% less durability in easy or peaceful (durability/5)_
➜ Armors crafted from Nether materials (while you remain in the dimension)
_↪ In the End dimension: 75% less durability in hard (durability/4) - 50% less durability in normal (durability/2) - 100% durability in easy or peaceful (no change)_
➜Tools, weapons, and armor crafted from End materials, they don't change in any dimension
**➤ Added new mobs**
➜ New silverfishes (one for each dimension)
➜ Scuttlers (one for each dimension)
➜ Mimics (one for each dimension)
➜ Hermit skeletons (one for each dimension)
➜ Spectrums (one for each dimension)
➜ Guardians (one for each gem)
**➤ Added 6 treasure chests (two types for each dimension)**
**➤ Added many items (apples, carrots, souls, rods, hearts, keys, orbs and more)**
**➤ Added many construction blocks (blocks, cut blocks, cut slabs, cut stairs, grates and chiseled blocks)**
**➤ Added many decorative blocks (trapdoors, doors, bars, fences, chains, lanterns and braziers)**
**➤ Traducido al español (ES-ES)**

Spoiler ![Minability Chart](https://i.postimg.cc/d1pbZvSk/2-1-Minability-Chart.png) **➤ Overworld gems** ➜ Class D: aquamarine, citrine, chrysocolla, spinel and zircon
➜ Class C: opal, garnet, peridot, malachite and jasper
➜ Class B: alexandrite, topaz, jade, agate and onyx
➜ Class A: crystalline diamond, tourmaline, ruby, fluorite and sapphire
➜ Class A+: white diamond, red tourmaline, purple ruby, green fluorite and pink sapphire
**➤ Nether gems** ➜ Class D: umbalite, nuummite, iolite, indraneelam and morganite
➜ Class C: bloodstone, azurite, danburite, sillimanite and almandine
➜ Class B: zoisite, blizzard, lepidolite, chrysoberyl and tiger's eye
➜ Class A: hexagonite, charoite, black opal, pietersite and serpentine
➜ Class A+: ghostly hexagonite, spooky charoite, cursed opal, soul pietersite and spectral serpentine
**➤ End gems** ➜ Class D: jadeite, benitoite, carnelian, larimar and enstatite
➜ Class C: goshenite, rhodonite, variscite, hawk's eye and cuprite
➜ Class B: ametrine, turquoise, boulder opal, unakite and titanite
➜ Class A: achroite, sphene, sunstone, seraphinite and moonstone
➜ Class A+: rainbow achroite, heavenly sphene, shining sunstone, stellar seraphinite and glowing moonstone

_↪ Smelt the dust_

_↪ Smelt the dust_

Spoiler **➤ Battle axe**
➜ 30% chance to deal extra damage
➜ 25% slower than a sword
➜ 4 (![Heart](https://i.postimg.cc/SxCwzsD1/Full.png)![Heart](https://i.postimg.cc/SxCwzsD1/Full.png)) more damage than a sword
➜ Crafting
_↪ Overworld battle axe ingredients: sharp gems + heavy gems + rod (silver, gold, platinum or palladium)_
![Battle Axe](https://i.postimg.cc/nVkcnN0s/5-1-1-Battle-Axe.gif) _↪ Nether battle axe ingredients: sharp gems + heavy gems + Nether rod_ ![Battle Axe](https://i.postimg.cc/MZDKzgdQ/5-1-2-Battle-Axe.gif) _↪ End battle axe ingredients: sharp gems + heavy gems + End rod_ ![Battle Axe](https://i.postimg.cc/Pf4rd02D/5-1-3-Battle-Axe.gif) _↪ Sacred battle axe ingredients (smithing table): battle axe (crafted with End gems class A+) + sacred gem_ / `1.16.5 to 1.19.2` ![Battle Axe](https://i.postimg.cc/445NXjBH/5-1-4-Battle-Axe.gif) _↪ Sacred battle axe ingredients (smithing table): phoenix stone + battle axe (crafted with End gems class A+) + sacred gem_ / `1.20.1 or above` ![Battle Axe](https://i.postimg.cc/SQrNmHD2/5-1-5-Battle-Axe.gif) **➤ Bone breaker**

➜ Crafting
_↪ Overworld heavy sword ingredients: heavy gems + rod (silver, gold, platinum or palladium)_
![Heavy Sword](https://i.postimg.cc/KctxhZ9T/5-4-1-Heavy-Sw-ord.gif) _↪ Nether heavy sword ingredients: heavy gems + Nether rod_ ![Heavy Sword](https://i.postimg.cc/057P18tn/5-4-2-Heavy-Sw-ord.gif) _↪ End heavy sword ingredients: heavy gems + End rod_ ![Heavy Sword](https://i.postimg.cc/J7jMC1Tq/5-4-3-Heavy-Sw-ord.gif) _↪ Sacred heavy sword ingredients (smithing table): heavy sword (crafted with End gems class A+) + sacred gem_ / `1.16.5 to 1.19.2` ![Heavy Sword](https://i.postimg.cc/bY1pfz6R/5-4-4-Heavy-Sw-ord.gif) _↪ Sacred heavy sword ingredients (smithing table): phoenix stone + heavy sword (crafted with End gems class A+) + sacred gem_ / `1.20.1 or above` ![Heavy Sword](https://i.postimg.cc/xjLnV0s3/5-4-5-Heavy-Sw-ord.gif) **➤ Hammer**
➜ Better ore drops (gem ores only)
➜ Gem ores drop fragment and chunk (no fragment embedded)
➜ Crafting
_↪ Overworld ingredients: heavy gems + rod (silver, gold, platinum or palladium)_
![Hammer](https://i.postimg.cc/KvFFZdVM/5-5-1-Hammer.gif) _↪ Nether ingredients: heavy gems + Nether rod_ ![Hammer](https://i.postimg.cc/MKxxWh4y/5-5-2-Hammer.gif) _↪ End ingredients: heavy gems + End rod_ ![Hammer](https://i.postimg.cc/fTZZw6FX/5-5-3-Hammer.gif) **➤ Sharp hammer**
➜ 100% more durability
➜ It is used to hasten the process of breaking dirt, sand, gravel, and other soil blocks (like a shovel)
➜ It is used to hasten the breaking of wood-based or other tough organic blocks (like an axe)
➜ It is used to mine rocks (any), rock-based blocks and metal-based blocks (like a pickaxe)
➜ It is not used to collect ores (except redstone, lapis lazuli, copper and Nether quartz)
➜ Crafting
_↪ Overworld ingredients: sharp gems + rod (silver, gold, platinum or palladium)_
![Sharp Hammer](https://i.postimg.cc/Qxh4rz1J/5-6-1-Sharp-Hammer.gif) _↪ Nether ingredients: sharp gems + Nether rod_ ![Sharp Hammer](https://i.postimg.cc/X74H0PdQ/5-6-2-Sharp-Hammer.gif) _↪ End ingredients: sharp gems + End rod_ ![Sharp Hammer](https://i.postimg.cc/rFMnLHxH/5-6-3-Sharp-Hammer.gif)

➤ Guardian ![Guardian](https://i.postimg.cc/PrLpk1Yp/6-1-Guardian-Spawn.png) ➜ Can spawn guardians with the blocks of the 75 available gems
➜ Overworld
_↪ Spawn: 3 gem blocks (Overworld gems) and a possessed ancient skull (100% probability)_
_↪ Health points: 50 ( ![Heart](https://i.postimg.cc/SxCwzsD1/Full.png) x 25 )_
_↪ Attack strength: 6_
➜ Nether
_↪ Spawn: 3 gem blocks (Nether gems) and a possessed Nether ancient skull (100% probability)_
_↪ Health points: 75 ( ![Heart](https://i.postimg.cc/SxCwzsD1/Full.png) x 35.5 )_
_↪ Attack strength: 9_
➜ End
_↪ Spawn: 3 gem blocks (End gems) and a possessed End ancient skull (100% probability)_
_↪ Health points: 100 ( ![Heart](https://i.postimg.cc/SxCwzsD1/Full.png) x 50 )_
_↪ Attack strength: 12_
➜ The guardian will attack all hostile mobs
_↪ It will attack any entity that hurts it_
➜ The guardian can be tamed
_↪ To tamed need hearts (made with Overworld gems), Nether hearts (made with Nether gems) or End hearts (made with End gems)_
_↪ It will always follow the owner_
_↪ It will kill entities that the owner attacks_
_↪ It will kill entities that attacks the owner_
➜ When guardian die spawn a spectrum (25% probability)

**➤ Updating so many versions of the mod is a major undertaking. As a result, I will be limiting the number of versions that receive new content moving forward.**
➜ Minecraft 1.16.5: The version I play on with my friends.
➜ Minecraft 1.20.1 & 1.21.1: Currently the most popular versions of the game.
➜ Minecraft 1.21.8 & 26.1.2: The latest versions of the mod.
